author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone  It's time for a final SHIPMAS surprise! 

Join us today for the unwrapping of a very special Star Atlas present:

Dropping live at 12 pm PST (8 pm UTC) on YouTube! 

Do not miss this historic & festive occasion! 

 Set a reminder now: https://m.youtube.com/watch?v=o-pXQQUoYU0
